privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated crash data created during setup_task.sh. The crash coordinates are correctly converted to radians (40.75 deg = 0.7112 rad, -73.996 deg = -1.2915 rad). The explicit requirement to enable atmosphere, landscape, azimuthal grid, and cardinal points maps directly to the required_flags metadata. Output paths for the report and screenshots are confirmed by export_result.sh and task instructions.
